title: swap_signal.json
description: Written by neurond to ~/.neuronbox/swap_signal.json when the client sends SwapModel. Read by serve_worker.py (neuron serve).

signal_version.description: Format version; bump on incompatible changes.

model_ref.description: Hugging Face id or logical reference passed to neuron swap.

ts.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the file was written.

resolved_model_dir.description: Resolved local path to model directory (from store or local filesystem). Added by CLI when resolution succeeds. Workers should prefer this over model_ref when present.
